lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: The doc lane finally drained this cycle, but only in the working tree. Every doc-drift finding from the 06-02 canonical audit (the v0.3.0 version stamp, the holidays table in section 15, the /api/holidays family in section 16, role/notes on shift templates, the four new settings keys, the M8 milestone, active_org on /api/me, the per-org-settings re-target, and the long-carried preference_log ghost) is now present and correct in docs/DESIGN.md. That work is finished and uncommitted, so it has shipped nothing. The last commit is still b41b853 (2026-05-29), six days back, and the tree keeps accreting: five modified files plus nine untracked BAR_RAISE reports and two audit docs. The one genuine HIGH is unchanged for the ninth straight report: the Discord webhook URL is committed in scripts/.discord_webhook.txt and still not gitignored. The whole pile collapses into one v0.3.1 commit. The blocker remains the commit, not the work.
